creator: rotkaps_spam_trap@gmx.de
text:
start gimp, load an image, and try to use some tools like paint, erase, blur(?), or something else
(sorry, my gimp is in german language, I try to guess the english toolnames).
result: Gimp crahes immediately on mouse click into the loaded image.

HINT: My ports are all up to date. Also Xorg is "renewed" to version 7.x (installed with packages).

How-To-Repeat: 	see description
